# CWE-338 safe — Use of Cryptographically Weak PRNG (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-338-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/rand"
	"encoding/hex"
	"io"
	"net/http"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Request *http.Request
}

type GormDB struct{}

func (db *GormDB) Save(model interface{}) error { return nil }

func RotateSessionID(c *GinCtx, db *GormDB) error {
	buf := make([]byte, 32)
	if _, err := io.ReadFull(rand.Reader, buf); err != nil {
		return err
	}
	sid := hex.EncodeToString(buf)
	return db.Save(map[string]string{"user": c.Request.URL.Query().Get("user"), "sid": sid})
}
